method: Filtered LODES8 OD (main+aux, both read to capture multi-state home leakage) to flows whose work-end block is a prospect worksite block. Aggregated the SI02 (Trade/Transport/Utilities — retail's super-sector) job marginal by home tract to get a modeled member-home distribution, then distributed the FACTUAL active-participant count (Form 5500) across tracts by that modeled share. Workforce age/earnings profiles are the OD SA/SE marginals over the in-scope flows.
tier_rationale: MODELED, area-based, not firm-specific: OD at a worksite block reflects all establishments in that block. Fair for big-box-dominated blocks (see representativeness.worksite_si02_share), noisier for mixed-use blocks. Never presented as factual member addresses.
deviation_from_methodology: METHODOLOGY.md states OD has no industry/age/earnings segments; the LODES8 OD files DO (SA/SE/SI columns, verified). This pipeline uses those directly instead of combining WAC/RAC under assumption. See the module docstring. METHODOLOGY.md should be updated.
limitations: SA/SE/SI are independent marginals of S000; no joint industry×age.
LODES covers 50 states + DC only; territory worksites excluded here.
Coarse 3-band segments; no finer demographic precision claimed.
